title: Cover for tank
abstract: The present invention relates to a radiator tank or housing (10) consisting of an external casing, the external casing having an upper wall (60), first and second side walls (40, 40') and bases (50, 50'), the bases (50, 50') of the external casing connecting the tank to the radiator manifold, the external casing being provided with a plurality of external ribs (20) and at least one rib (30, 30') being located internally at the join between the upper wall (60) and each of the first and second side walls (40, 40')
claims:
Claims 1. Radiator tank (10) consisting of an external casing, the external casing having an upper wall (60), a first side wall (40) and a second side wall (40ГўВҖВҷ) and bases (50, 50ГўВҖВҷ), the bases (50, 50ГўВҖВҷ) of the external casing connecting the tank to the radiator manifold, the radiator tank being characterized in that the external casing is provided with: a plurality of external ribs (20); and at least one rib (30, 30ГўВҖВҷ) located internally at the join between the upper wall (60) and each of the first and second side walls (40, 40ГўВҖВҷ). 2. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the external casing is provided with at least one pair of the at least one internal rib (30, 30ГўВҖВҷ), each internal rib of the pair of internal ribs being located internally, at the join between the upper wall (60) and each of the first and second side walls (40, 40ГўВҖВҷ). 3. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the external casing is provided with a plurality of pairs of the at least one internal rib (30, 30ГўВҖВҷ). 4. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the at least one internal rib (30, 30ГўВҖВҷ) is contained in the same geometric plane as at least one of the plurality of external ribs, the same geometric plane being transverse to the length of the external casing of the radiator tank (10). 5. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the plurality of pairs of internal ribs (30, 30ГўВҖВҷ) is transverse to the length of the casing of the radiator tank (10). 6. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that each of the plurality of main ribs (20) extends along at least one portion of the first side wall (40), the upper wall (60) and at least one portion of the second side wall (40ГўВҖВҷ). 7. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the thickness of the at least one internal rib (30) is greater than the thickness of each of the plurality of external ribs (20). 8. Radiator tank (10) according to Claim 1 , characterized in that the thickness of each of the plurality of external ribs (20) is the same as the thickness of 

 the walls (40, 40ГўВҖВҷ, 60) of the external casing. 9. Radiator tank (10) according to any one of Claims 1 to 8, characterized in that it is a tank with a width to height ratio of less than or equal to 1 .5. 10. Radiator (10) for a vehicle characterized in that it comprises at least one tank of the type described in any one of Claims 1 to 9.
